steps.title: Set up the inequality
steps.content:
Carmen has 64 signatures and needs at least 100. Let $x$ be the number of additional signatures needed. This gives us:
$$64 + x \geq 100$$

steps.title: Solve for the minimum
steps.content:
Subtract 64 from both sides of the inequality:
$$x \geq 36$$
The minimum number of additional signatures Carmen needs is 36. That matches choice A — A is correct.
